creator: lwhsu@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to p5B2EA84B3 from comment #1)
There is maintainer timeout policy (2 weeks) so we need to respect the maintainer.

And this is mainly for updating mitmproxy, which we are also waiting for a patch.

Yes this is a security issue so we can even ask ports-secteam or portmgr for approving maintainer override, but that's also after we have a patch (for mitmproxy.)

Thanks for your patience and it possible, please share your working patch, which will greatly improve the progress.
